target.title: [Repo Assist] test(chat): add 19 tests for untested ChatTimelineReducer event paths
target.body:
🤖 *Repo Assist — automated AI assistant.*

## What

Adds 19 new unit tests to `ChatTimelineReducerTests.cs`, covering event types that had no direct tests. The reducer grows from 22 tests to 41.

### New coverage

| Event / method | Tests added |
|---|---|
| `ChatReasoningEvent` / `ChatReasoningDeltaEvent` | creates entry, appends delta, full event replaces, TurnEnd clears `ActiveReasoningId` |
| `ChatIntentEvent` | sets `CurrentIntent`, overwrites previous, no timeline entry |
| `ChatPermissionRequestEvent` / `ClearPermission` | sets `PendingPermission`, `ClearPermission` removes it, `TurnEnd` also clears it |
| `ChatStatusEvent` / `AddSystem` | correct kind, tone, and text; explicit tone override |
| `ChatRestoredEvent` | info-tone status entry |
| `ChatModelChangedEvent` | success-tone status entry containing model name |
| `ChatRawEvent` | raw entry on non-empty text; no-op on null or empty text |
| `ChatContextChangedEvent` | confirmed no-op (returns state unchanged) |
| Unknown `ChatEvent` subtype | confirmed no-op via switch default |

## Why

`ChatTimelineReducer` is a pure state machine used by every chat surface. Gaps in test coverage mean silent regressions if any of these event paths change. All additions are pure-function tests with no I/O or timing dependencies.

## Test Status

- ✅ `dotnet test OpenClaw.Tray.Tests` — **41/41 new + existing reducer tests pass**
- ✅ 1136 other tray tests pass
- i️ 10 pre-existing `LocalGatewaySetupTests` failures (WSL/distro infrastructure, unrelated to this PR)
- ✅ `dotnet test OpenClaw.Shared.Tests` — 1883 pass; 8 pre-existing `McpHttpServerTests` failures (network, unrelated)
